next_steps: Perform skin biopsy of a representative lesion (for H&E, DIF, and tissue culture)
Order serologic testing: HIV, RPR/TP-PA for syphilis, ANA, ENA, ANCA, and serum complement levels
Perform nasal biopsy of the crusting lesion for histopathology and cultures
Review complete blood count with specific attention to MCV and peripheral blood smear for vacuolated precursors
Serum ferritin, LDH, and C-reactive protein levels to assess inflammatory burden
Urine protein-creatinine ratio and microscopic urinalysis
